name: HR holiday observance policy example
answer:
Employees receive up to 5 paid company holidays each year.
Managers may not approve schedule adjustments for observed holidays.
Employees receive an automatic holiday cash bonus.

sources.title: HR Holiday Observance Policy
sources.content:
Employees receive up to 5 paid company holidays each year.
Employees may carry over 10 unused company holidays into the next calendar year.
Managers may approve schedule adjustments for observed holidays.
